title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Asset prices, particularly in the Tanker sector, have seen a remarkable upswing following the sharp spike in freight rates triggered by the developments in the Middle East. We are also noticing strong competition on the Dry side, mainly for Japanese built tonnage, with some vessels being offered for sale managing to attract more than a dozen buyers. Dry Bulk
The Capesize CAPE SANDRA (ABT 175K DWT, 2011, HHIC-SUBIC) has been reported sold at region USD 32 m, basis surveys due in May 2026.
